titleStmt.title: SII 9.494: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 494. (A.R. No. 309 of 1905.) ON A PILLAR WITHIN THE ANTARALA-MANDAPA OF THE CHANNAKESAVASVAMI TEMPLE AT PUSHPAGIRI, CUDDAPPAH TALUK, CUDDAPPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1436, Bhāva, Chaitra, śu. 1, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1514 March 27, Monday, in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that the king made a gift of the village China-Māṁchupalli in Charnnūra-sīme, a subdivision of Mulikināḍa-sīme for the service and offerings of the god Channakēśava of Pushpagiri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāha
naśakavarṣaṁbulu 1436 saṁda mēle naḍava
bhāvasaṁvatsarada cayitra śu 1 sō lū
śrīmaṁmahārā jādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇarāyamahārā
yaru puṣpagiriya cannakēśavadēvarige koṭṭa grā
mada dharmaśāsana cannakēśavadēvara pūje puna
skāra Amṛtapaḍi naivēdyakke mulikināṁḍa
śīmevoḷage carnnūrasīme voḷagaṇa cina
māṁcupali grāmavanū tathātithi manvādipuṇyakā
ladalu sahiraṇyōdakadānadhārāpūravakavāgi sa
marpistavu Ā cinamāṁcupaliya grāmada catussīme
ge voḷagāda gadde bedalu tōṭa tuḍiki nidhi nikṣēpa jala
pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha sādhyagaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhō
ga tēja svāmya Ēnuṁṭādanū Āgumāḍikoṁḍu canna
kēśavadēvara pūje punaskāra Amṛtapaḍi naivēdyava
nū cannāgi naḍasaluḷavaru Eṁdu koṭṭa dharmaśā
sanavu śrīvirūpākṣā . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānātśrēyōnupālanaṁ dānā
tsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svattāddvi
guṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa
svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta
vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.494 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
